retry_reason: The put operation always executes and releases a reference; it cannot be retried as the object may be freed and the pointer becomes invalid.
contract_summary: This is a put-wrapper that releases one reference on the passed crypto_aead object by calling crypto_free_aead. After the call, the caller must not dereference or otherwise use the tfm pointer because the object may have been freed. The function does not transfer any ownership to the caller and is part of the object teardown lifecycle. There is no return value to check; the operation is unconditional.
